title: sessilanthera latifolia subsp. heliantha
intro: Sessilanthera latifolia subsp. heliantha, also known as heliantha, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Stilbaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with heliantha include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Heliantha can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat minor injuries and skin conditions.
